title: Haag-Kastler AQFT — Local Algebras by EML Depth

analysis.object: T824: Haag-Kastler AQFT — Local Algebras by EML Depth depth analysis

local_algebras.description: A(O): algebra of observables in region O -- EML-2 (C*-algebra = measurement structure)

isotony.description: A(O1) subset A(O2) for O1 subset O2 -- EML-1 (growing inclusion chain)

locality.description: [A(O1), A(O2)] = 0 for spacelike O1, O2 -- EML-0 (commuting = discrete separation)

covariance.description: Poincare group acts on A(O) -- EML-0 (symmetry group action)

vacuum.description: Vacuum representation via GNS: EML-3 (representation theory)

4d_aqft.description: 4D AQFT: Buchholz-Summers-Doplicher framework. Local algebras are type III von Neumann algebras -- EML-inf? No -- type III = EML-3 (oscillatory spectra).

t824_theorem.description: T824: AQFT local algebra structure is {EML-0, EML-1, EML-2, EML-3} -- all EML-finite. AQFT provides an EML-finite framework for 4D QFT. The YM mass gap in AQFT = spectral gap of vacuum representation. T824: AQFT is viable for constructive 4D YM.
t824_theorem.reason: AQFT is EML-finite. It can house the 4D YM construction. T824.

analysis.theorem: T824: Haag-Kastler AQFT — Local Algebras by EML Depth (S1103).

key_theorem: T824: Haag-Kastler AQFT — Local Algebras by EML Depth (S1103).
